# Design Intend

> Architecture, construction, and interior design studio in Hosur, Tamil Nadu, India. Founded 2014 by Ar. Chittrarasan.

Design Intend provides end-to-end architectural and interior design services in Hosur, Krishnagiri District, Tamil Nadu. The studio handles everything from initial concept and drawings to full construction supervision and interior fitout — clients get a single point of contact from blank plot to finished home or commercial space.

Principal architect: Ar. Chittrarasan (COA-registered, Adhiyaman College of Engineering, Hosur). Founded: 2014. Projects delivered: 85+. Service area: Hosur, Krishnagiri, Bengaluru, Attibele, Bagalur, Denkanikottai, Sarjapura, Perithalmanna (Kerala).

Contact: +91 73976 06382 | info@designintend.com | https://wa.me/917397606382

Address: No.2, Second Floor, Balamurugan Towers, Nanjundeeswar Nagar Ring Road, Hosur, Tamil Nadu 635109, India

## Core Pages

- [Home](https://www.designintend.com/): Studio overview, services, featured projects, testimonials, and contact form
- [About Design Intend](https://www.designintend.com/about): Studio history, founder profile, credentials, team, and values — founded 2014, COA-registered, 85+ projects
- [Projects Portfolio](https://www.designintend.com/projects): Full project gallery — residential homes, villas, commercial buildings, and interior projects with images

## Architecture Services

- [Architects in Hosur](https://www.designintend.com/architects-hosur): Residential and commercial architectural design — concept, drawings, DTCP approvals, site supervision
- [Residential Architects Hosur](https://www.designintend.com/residential-architects-hosur): Specialist residential architecture — homes, villas, farmhouses, individual house designs
- [Design & Build Hosur](https://www.designintend.com/design-build-hosur): Single-contract architecture + construction — one team, one fee, full accountability from design to handover
- [Modern House Architects Hosur](https://www.designintend.com/modern-house-architects-hosur): Contemporary and modern home design — flat roofs, large glazing, minimalist aesthetics

## Construction Services

- [Construction Company Hosur](https://www.designintend.com/construction-company-hosur): House and commercial construction with fixed-price contracts and on-site engineer supervision
- [House Construction Hosur](https://www.designintend.com/house-construction-hosur): End-to-end house construction from foundation to handover — Standard, Premium, Luxury tiers
- [Villa Construction Hosur](https://www.designintend.com/villa-construction-hosur): Premium and luxury villa construction in Hosur with full architectural and structural oversight
- [Villa Builders Hosur](https://www.designintend.com/villa-builders-hosur): Specialist villa builders — gated community villas, independent villas, farmhouse construction
- [Luxury Home Builders Hosur](https://www.designintend.com/luxury-home-builders-hosur): High-specification luxury home construction — imported materials, home automation, premium finishes
- [Turnkey Construction Hosur](https://www.designintend.com/turnkey-construction-hosur): Complete turnkey construction including civil work, MEP, and full interior fitout
- [Building Contractors Hosur](https://www.designintend.com/building-contractors-hosur): Licensed building contractors for residential and commercial projects in Hosur and Krishnagiri
- [Home Builders Hosur](https://www.designintend.com/home-builders-hosur): Home building services — individual house construction for plots in Hosur
- [Home Renovation Hosur](https://www.designintend.com/home-renovation-hosur): Full home renovation and remodelling — structural changes, interior refresh, kitchen and bathroom upgrades

## Location-Specific Construction

- [House Construction Attibele](https://www.designintend.com/house-construction-attibele): House construction services in Attibele — residential projects near the Karnataka-Tamil Nadu border
- [House Construction Bagalur](https://www.designintend.com/house-construction-bagalur): House construction in Bagalur — plots and construction near Hosur industrial corridor
- [House Construction Denkanikottai](https://www.designintend.com/house-construction-denkanikottai): House construction in Denkanikottai — homes in the Krishnagiri-Hosur belt
- [House Construction Sarjapura](https://www.designintend.com/house-construction-sarjapura): House construction in Sarjapura — residential projects near Bengaluru's eastern growth corridor

## Interior Design Services

- [Interior Designers Hosur](https://www.designintend.com/interior-designers-hosur): Full-home interior design and execution — living rooms, bedrooms, kitchens, bathrooms
- [Home Interiors Hosur](https://www.designintend.com/home-interiors-hosur): Interior design packages for completed homes — modular, semi-modular, and bespoke options
- [Interior Designers Bagalur](https://www.designintend.com/interior-designers-bagalur): Interior design services in Bagalur — residential interiors near Hosur
- [Interior Designers Denkanikottai](https://www.designintend.com/interior-designers-denkanikottai): Interior design in Denkanikottai — home and commercial interiors
- [Interior Designers Sarjapura](https://www.designintend.com/interior-designers-sarjapura): Interior design in Sarjapura — residential interiors near east Bengaluru
- [Modular Kitchen Hosur](https://www.designintend.com/modular-kitchen-hosur): Custom modular kitchen design with Hettich/Hafele hardware and quartz countertops
- [2BHK Interior Design Hosur](https://www.designintend.com/2bhk-interior-design-hosur): Complete 2BHK interior packages with transparent pricing — all rooms, all finishes
- [3BHK Interior Design Hosur](https://www.designintend.com/3bhk-interior-design-hosur): Complete 3BHK interior packages — full fitout including woodwork, flooring, lighting, and false ceiling

## Cost Guides & Calculator

- [Construction Cost Calculator](https://www.designintend.com/construction-cost-hosur): Interactive 3-step calculator — instant estimate for Standard, Premium, or Luxury build in Hosur
- [House Construction Cost Hosur](https://www.designintend.com/house-construction-cost-hosur): 2026 guide — Standard ₹1,950, Premium ₹2,050, Luxury ₹2,300 per sq ft in Hosur
- [Interior Design Cost Hosur](https://www.designintend.com/interior-design-cost-hosur): 2026 guide — room-by-room cost breakdown, package tiers, and red flags to avoid
- [Build Your Home Guide](https://www.designintend.com/build-your-home-hosur): Comprehensive guide to building a home in Hosur — land, approvals, design, construction, and handover

- [Best Architects in Hosur](https://www.designintend.com/best-architects-in-hosur): How to evaluate and choose the best architect in Hosur — criteria, credentials, red flags
